creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Zhenlei Huang from comment #9)

I tried the snapshot: FreeBSD-14.0-RC1-arm64-aarch64-ROCK64.img
dd'd to USB3 media and booted on the Windows DevKit 2023:

QUOTE
# /usr/bin/kyua test -k /usr/tests/Kyuafile sys/net/if_lagg_test:status_stress
sys/net/if_lagg_test:status_stress  ->  passed  [60.075s]

Results file id is usr_tests.20231013-100506-316962
Results saved to /root/.kyua/store/results.usr_tests.20231013-100506-316962.db

1/1 passed (0 failed)
END QUOTE

At this point there are no stable/14 snapshots available to try.
